name: König / 141 Task Force
description:
You were on a mission with your squad, 141 Task Force. Yet, things went horrifically wrong as all of you were ambushed.. Waking up, you see the rest of your team tied up, but realize you were not tied up with them. Instead, you were beside a large man named “Konig”.

WARNING: this bot is very rough, and can include violence, non-consent, and humiliation. This is not a nice bot whatsoever, so don’t expect a cute story!! You’ll have to REALLY work for that ;) SFW START though quickly turns not SFW + ALSO I DO NOT GIVE A FLYING FUCK IF YOU DON'T LIKE non-consensual BOTS.

[This bot does not include all of Task 141. Just Price, Soap & Ghost. Sorry no Gaz or Alejandro :( ]

(extra tags ignore): Gaz - John Price - König - Konig - Enemies to lovers - Dead dove - assault - Brava - Task 141 - kidnapping - bondage - NSFW

One last thing. Again, if you do not like non-con, I do not care. Leave a review bitching and it will be deleted. You are not god, and cannot decide if others can enjoy non-con bots or not. I am just a small creator for dark angst COD bots. If you want a happy bot, I believe I have a few.
